# third_party/nasm — NASM Assembler

> NASM (Netwide Assembler) — vendored for bootstrap.

Used to build Tattva OS before utasm is ready.
Will be replaced by utasm as the assembler matures.

Version: see `nasm/VERSION`
Upstream: https://www.nasm.us/
License: BSD 2-Clause

Part of the `third_party/` category in Tattva OS.
